testcase.name: addAndRemoveProductTest

failure.message: Cart is not empty after removing product! expected [0] but found [1]

testcase.name: verifySubtotalUpdatesTest

failure.message: Subtotal did not update after changing quantity! did not expect [ ₹94,990.00] but found [ ₹94,990.00]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Subtotal did not update after changing quantity! did not expect [ ₹94,990.00] but found [ ₹94,990.00] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
